subject: docs(todo): full re-validation via 11 parallel agents (coverage + 10 per-repo)
body:
Spawned 1 coverage agent + 10 per-repo agents against live GitHub state.
Deltas since 2026-04-18:

Coverage:
- tool-till-tees: untracked first-party backend (powers four-ems +
  Sancio) — added to tracking list with placeholder section pending
  first-pass audit. canva-grid-assets correctly skipped.

Per-repo progress since 2026-04-18:
- repo-tor: Triggers section VERIFIED DONE (all 8 group tables +
  Meta sweeps + Reflective passes). Small new gap: DOWNLOAD_PDF
  missing .no-print class + trigger button.
- few-lap: Triggers DONE (Meta sweeps + Reflective passes now
  present), Z_INDEX_SCALE DONE (src/constants/zIndex.ts typed
  tiers), ICON_CACHE_BUST DONE (scripts/inject-icon-hashes.mjs +
  IconCacheDisclosure.tsx).
- model-pear: Communication section DONE (CLAUDE.md line 365),
  Z_INDEX_SCALE DONE (Tailwind config extends).
- graphiki: Z_INDEX_SCALE DONE, ICON_CACHE_BUST user communication
  DONE (collapsible in InstallInstructionsModal.tsx).
- sun-sea-o: MASSIVE PROGRESS — HISTORY.md/CLAUDE.md/Triggers/
  Communication/prohibition, BurgerMenu, DaisyUI, THEME_DARK_MODE
  framework, PWA singleton, ICON_CACHE_BUST core all DONE. Remaining:
  DEBUG_SYSTEM 6 items, PWA install-modal user comm, theme color
  migration audit.

Regression corrections:
- see-veo: "PWA Diagnostics third tab already present" claim was
  FALSE — DebugBanner.tsx has only 2 tabs (type Tab = 'diagnostics'
  | 'log'). Corrected in TODO + added as 9th DEBUG_SYSTEM item.
- model-pear: confirmed docs/HISTORY.md still exists; removal items
  remain valid (agent earlier claim was wrong).

Bonus findings:
- synctone: local docs/implementations/ folder has 3 patterns not
  in glow-props (HTTPS_PROXY, KEY_LESSONS, TIMER_LEAKS). Flag for
  human review before deletion.
- few-lap: __DEV__ guard in debugLog.ts still missing (TEMPORARY
  comment still present, production debug-pill leak risk).

Updated Gap Matrix (3 rows improved: model-pear, few-lap, graphiki,
sun-sea-o), added tool-till-tees row with ? placeholders, updated
Cross-Cutting Gaps summary.

Tags: documentation, audit, todo, cross-fleet, coverage
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
